    spring != summer).

    ~favorite(mia,X0) | ~favorite(emma,X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    favorite(emma,summer)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    fall != winter).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~favorite(mia,spring)).
